creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch updates graphics/openjump from 1.4.0.3 to 1.4.2.

While I was here I did some more issues:

- Creating a link from ${PREFIX}/openjump/bin/openjump 
  to ${PREFIX}/bin/openjump

- Adding a hint for reloadable extensions and plugins in pkg_descr

- Patching bin/oj_linux.sh to get this script work with java/openjdk6
  ==> PLEASE proof, if this breaks other java versions, thanks.

- A little cleanup for .dll's and some licence texts (should them be copied
  into ${DOCSDIR} at all?)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
